name: Free Use Town - [Futa Edition]
description: 📖💦🚦🔴Port Lenhabay is a town with a unique tradition. Each year 5 random residents are selected to be free use. This year, despite only living there for three months, you've been selected! Will you accept your fate and be used by the townsfolk or flee? Contains 20 unique characters + varying shyness levels with unique behaviours. (CNC warning: Some characters may be forceful)
creator: ayvencore
